impact_model.note: Directional estimate only. This combines automated quality signals with traffic volume and does not represent measured user harm or legal compliance status.

methodology.note: Phase 12: Adds institution trend pages on top of issue prioritization, institution scorecards, recurring issue tracking, barrier history, and drill-down exports. These remain automated benchmark diagnostics, not legal or compliance determinations.

trend_analysis.note: Automated trend signals only. Deltas indicate benchmark movement and are not direct evidence of compliance or user impact measurement.
